description.source: This article brings an elaborated guide for configuring, starting and managing your projects as a project manager.
description.target: This article brings an elaborated guide for configuring, starting and managing your projects as a project manager.

body:0001.source: How to build your first project?
body:0001.target: How to build your first project?

body:0002.source: This guide introduces the main steps of managing projects on the Go Vocal platform:
body:0002.target: This guide introduces the main steps of managing projects on the Go Vocal platform:

body:0003.source: 1. Logging in and exploring the back end.
body:0003.target: 1. Logging in and exploring the back end.

body:0004.source: Use the invitation email from your administrator, or go to your platform and click Log in.
body:0004.target: Use the invitation email from your administrator, or go to your platform and click Log in.

body:0005.source: If prompted, take the onboarding tour to explore features.
body:0005.target: If prompted, take the onboarding tour to explore features.

body:0006.source: If the tour does not appear, contact support to activate it.
body:0006.target: If the tour does not appear, contact support to activate it.

body:0010.source: Click New Project and choose from scratch or from a template.
body:0010.target: Click New Project and choose from scratch or from a template.

body:0011.source: Enter project name, tags, areas, and upload pictures.
body:0011.target: Enter project name, tags, areas, and upload pictures.

body:0014.source: Set up: update title, tags, areas, images, and URL (slug), and write a short description or use the content builder for advanced formatting.
body:0014.target: Set up: update title, tags, areas, images, and URL (slug), and write a short description or use the content builder for advanced formatting.

body:0015.source: Input Tags: if using ideation, define tags for categorizing inputs.
body:0015.target: Input Tags: if using ideation, define tags for categorizing inputs.

body:0016.source: Access rights: control visibility, default assignee, and project managers.
body:0016.target: Access rights: control visibility, default assignee, and project managers.

body:0018.source: 3. Planning your project phases and participation methods.
body:0018.target: 3. Planning your project phases and participation methods.

body:0019.source: In the Timeline tab you can configure our timeline, phases and participation methods. Each phase of the timeline has a phase start/end date and a participation method. Common methods include:
body:0019.target: In the Timeline tab you can configure our timeline, phases and participation methods. Each phase of the timeline has a phase start/end date and a participation method. Common methods include:

body:0020.source: Collect input and feedback: gather ideas on a list or map, with voting and commenting.
body:0020.target: Collect input and feedback: gather ideas on a list or map, with voting and commenting.

body:0021.source: Proposals, petitions, initiatives: allow citizens to submit and support proposals.
body:0021.target: Proposals, petitions, initiatives: allow citizens to submit and support proposals.

body:0023.source: Voting/prioritization: participants vote or rank options (e.g., participatory budgeting).
body:0023.target: Voting/prioritization: participants vote or rank options (e.g., participatory budgeting).

body:0026.source: Document annotation: collect feedback directly on documents.
body:0026.target: Document annotation: collect feedback directly on documents.

body:0035.source: (Premium/Enterprise) use Share to generate a test link for internal review.
body:0035.target: (Premium/Enterprise) use Share to generate a test link for internal review.

body:0037.source: Click Publish to go live immediately, or
body:0037.target: Click Publish to go live immediately, or

body:0038.source: Click Request Approval (Premium/Enterprise) to submit for admin/folder manager approval.
body:0038.target: Click Request Approval (Premium/Enterprise) to submit for admin/folder manager approval.

body:0041.source: Use the Audience tab to look at your project demographics, download the list of participants and monitor traffic
body:0041.target: Use the Audience tab to look at your project demographics, download the list of participants and monitor traffic

body:0042.source: Send direct emails via the Messaging tab.
body:0042.target: Send direct emails via the Messaging tab.

body:0043.source: for each phase use the Notifications tab to turn automatic emails on and off
body:0043.target: for each phase use the Notifications tab to turn automatic emails on and off

body:0045.source: Use the Input Manager to assign or reassign inputs.
body:0045.target: Use the Input Manager to assign or reassign inputs.

body:0046.source: Move or copy inputs between phases if needed.
body:0046.target: Move or copy inputs between phases if needed.

body:0047.source: Ensure someone is responsible for processing posts in your project settings General tab > Access rights.
body:0047.target: Ensure someone is responsible for processing posts in your project settings General tab > Access rights.

body:0048.source: 6. Analyzing results and closing the project.
body:0048.target: 6. Analyzing results and closing the project.

body:0049.source: Add a final Information phase to publish outcomes.
body:0049.target: Add a final Information phase to publish outcomes.

body:0050.source: Use the Report builder to summarize results.
body:0050.target: Use the Report builder to summarize results.

body:0051.source: Apply the AI Sensemaking tool to analyze large volumes of input.
body:0051.target: Apply the AI Sensemaking tool to analyze large volumes of input.

body:0052.source: Publish the report so participants are informed of the final decision.
body:0052.target: Publish the report so participants are informed of the final decision.

body:0053.source: ℹ️ For more information on the participation methods on our platform to use read: Overview of our Participation methods
body:0053.target: ℹ️ For more information on the participation methods on our platform to use read: Overview of our Participation methods
